com.pdfsolid.conversion

Class CPDFConversion

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion

  • public class CPDFConversion
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides functionalities to convert PDF files into various formats such as Word, Excel, PPT, HTML, etc.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CPDFConversion() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static ErrorCode startPDFToExcel(java.lang.String filePath, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String outputPath, ExcelOptions options)
      Converts a PDF file to Excel format.
      static ErrorCode startPDFToExcel(java.lang.String filePath, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String outputPath, ExcelOptions options, ConvertCallback callback)
      Converts a PDF file to Excel format with progress callback.
      static ErrorCode startPDFToHtml(java.lang.String filePath, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String outputPath, HtmlOptions options)
      Converts a PDF file to HTML format.
      static ErrorCode startPDFToHtml(java.lang.String filePath, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String outputPath, HtmlOptions options, ConvertCallback callback)
      Converts a PDF file to HTML format with progress callback.

      Converts a PDF file to a series of images.
      static ErrorCode startPDFToImage(java.lang.String filePath, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String outputPath, ImageOptions options, ConvertCallback callback)
      Converts a PDF file to a series of images with progress callback.

      Converts a PDF file to structured JSON format.

      Converts a PDF file to structured JSON format with progress callback.

      Converts a PDF file to Word format.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CPDFConversion

        public CPDFConversion()

    • Method Detail

      • startPDFToWord

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToWord(java.lang.String filePath,
                                       java.lang.String password,
                                       java.lang.String outputPath,
                                       WordOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to Word format.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Word file will be saved.
        options - The Word conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToWord

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToWord(java.lang.String filePath,
                                       java.lang.String password,
                                       java.lang.String outputPath,
                                       WordOptions options,
                                       ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to Word format with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Word file will be saved.
        options - The Word conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToExcel

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToExcel(java.lang.String filePath,
                                        java.lang.String password,
                                        java.lang.String outputPath,
                                        ExcelOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to Excel format.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Excel file will be saved.
        options - The Excel conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToExcel

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToExcel(java.lang.String filePath,
                                        java.lang.String password,
                                        java.lang.String outputPath,
                                        ExcelOptions options,
                                        ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to Excel format with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Excel file will be saved.
        options - The Excel conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToPpt

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToPpt(java.lang.String filePath,
                                      java.lang.String password,
                                      java.lang.String outputPath,
                                      PptOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to PowerPoint format.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the PowerPoint file will be saved.
        options - The PowerPoint conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToPpt

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToPpt(java.lang.String filePath,
                                      java.lang.String password,
                                      java.lang.String outputPath,
                                      PptOptions options,
                                      ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to PowerPoint format with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the PowerPoint file will be saved.
        options - The PowerPoint conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the HTML file will be saved.
        options - The HTML conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToHtml(java.lang.String filePath,
                                       java.lang.String password,
                                       java.lang.String outputPath,
                                       HtmlOptions options,
                                       ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to HTML format with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the HTML file will be saved.
        options - The HTML conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToImage

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToImage(java.lang.String filePath,
                                        java.lang.String password,
                                        java.lang.String outputPath,
                                        ImageOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to a series of images.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The directory where the images will be saved.
        options - The image conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToImage

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToImage(java.lang.String filePath,
                                        java.lang.String password,
                                        java.lang.String outputPath,
                                        ImageOptions options,
                                        ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to a series of images with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The directory where the images will be saved.
        options - The image conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

                                           java.lang.String password,

        Converts a PDF file to Markdown format.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Markdown file will be saved.
        options - The Markdown conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

                                           java.lang.String password,
                                           java.lang.String outputPath,
                                           MarkdownOptions options,
                                           ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to Markdown format with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the Markdown file will be saved.
        options - The Markdown conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToRtf

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToRtf(java.lang.String filePath,
                                      java.lang.String password,
                                      java.lang.String outputPath,
                                      RtfOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to RTF (Rich Text Format).
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the RTF file will be saved.
        options - The RTF conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

      • startPDFToRtf

        public static ErrorCode startPDFToRtf(java.lang.String filePath,
                                      java.lang.String password,
                                      java.lang.String outputPath,
                                      RtfOptions options,
                                      ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to RTF (Rich Text Format) with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the RTF file will be saved.
        options - The RTF conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

                                      java.lang.String outputPath,

        Converts a PDF file to plain text format.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the TXT file will be saved.
        options - The TXT conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

                                      java.lang.String password,

        Parameters:

        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the TXT file will be saved.
        options - The TXT conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the JSON file will be saved.
        options - The JSON conversion options.

                                                java.lang.String outputPath,
                                                SearchablePdfOptions options)
        Converts a PDF file to a searchable PDF.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the searchable PDF will be saved.
        options - The searchable PDF conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

                                                java.lang.String password,
                                                java.lang.String outputPath,
                                                SearchablePdfOptions options,
                                                ConvertCallback callback)
        Converts a PDF file to a searchable PDF with progress callback.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the input PDF file.
        password - The password for the PDF file, or empty if not encrypted.
        outputPath - The path where the searchable PDF will be saved.
        options - The searchable PDF conversion options.
        callback - The callback for progress and cancellation, or null if not needed.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

        outputPath - The path where the OFD file will be saved.
        options - The OFD conversion options.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the conversion.

        outputPath - The path where the OFD file will be saved.
        options - The OFD conversion options.
